name: steam-sim-perf-check
description: Plan a Steam SIM launch + local model perf notes (does not auto-launch unless shell allowed)

steps.text: Default seed: SimCity 4 Deluxe appid 24780. Launch with: python scripts/steam_launch.py 24780. Skill steam-sim-launch.

steps.prompt: Using skill steam-sim-launch and knowledge/steam/sim-games-launch.md, produce a short perf-test plan: (1) pre-doctor steps (2) launch command for appid 24780 SimCity 4 Deluxe (3) post checks while game runs (4) verdict criteria for model usable vs degraded (5) when to stop the game. Do not invent other AppIDs as installed.
